THRONEFALL_POWER.title: Thronefall
THRONEFALL_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, if you have [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] in your hand, deal 9 damage to ALL enemies.
THRONEFALL_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, if you have [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] in your hand, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
HEIRS_AGONY_POWER.title: Heir's Agony
HEIRS_AGONY_POWER.description: When you [gold]block[/gold] damage, [gold]Forge[/gold] an amount equal to the damage blocked.
